resources_profile: High-density metallic asteroid clusters; stable terrestrial and rocky operations
enc_challenges: Erratic asteroid drift, micro-collisions, shifting debris clouds, relay repositioning
cargo_pricing_implications: Debris-density and route-risk trigger bands drive deductible/loading

resources_profile: Mapped asteroid belt with stable routes and high-gravity mining planet
enc_challenges: Radiation spikes from binary-star alignments, ambient radiation, temperature extremes
cargo_pricing_implications: Radiation-trigger endorsements and temporary hazard surcharges

resources_profile: Rare-metal extraction in broad asymmetric asteroid ring
enc_challenges: Low-visibility environment, sporadic flare risk, orbital shear and gravitational gradients
cargo_pricing_implications: Highest catastrophe loading, stricter routing controls, higher co-insurance
